summary: The diff addresses both REQ-1 (Fix Add Cattle/Buffalo) and REQ-2 (Fix Add Customer) by replacing broken combined hooks with separate useAddCattle/useUpdateCattle and useAddCustomer/useUpdateCustomer hooks, updating CattleForm and CustomerForm components, and wiring up proper error handling and toast notifications in CattleManagement.tsx and CustomerManagement.tsx. All acceptance criteria appear to be covered: correct backend method calls, query invalidation for immediate list updates, and toast success/error feedback.
